'''Slayn''' was a [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] colony [[City/Legends|city]] located in the [[Roche system]]. Along with [[Korpil]], Slayn co-created the [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter]] for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].<ref name="Strongholds" />

{{Loc-stub}}
